# UC-17.6.8 · Akamai Guardicore Reveal Label Coverage and Ungrouped Assets (`guardicore:agent`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Inventory, Configuration &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

Assets without labels escape intent-based policies.

## Value

Ensures automation and orchestration targets complete inventory.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:agent" earliest=-4h
| where isnull(label_group) OR label_group=""
| stats dc(hostname) as unlabeled by datacenter
| where unlabeled>0
```

## Visualization

Single value (unlabeled), table.

## Known False Positives

Microseg blocks from new app deployments, missing exception rules, or planned segmentation rollouts.

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
